mapper.select: SELECT * FROM audit_plan ORDER BY plan_year DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_plan(plan_type, plan_year, batch, plan_name, file_url, status, create_time) VALUES (#{planType}, #{planYear}, #{batch}, #{planName}, #{fileUrl}, 0, now())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM audit_plan WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM audit_unit ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_unit(unit_name, unit_type, profile, history_audit, create_time) VALUES (#{unitName},#{unitType},#{profile},#{historyAudit},now())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM audit_unit WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM audit_leader AND unit_id=#{unitId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_leader(name, unit_id, position, tenure_start, tenure_end, create_time) VALUES (#{name},#{unitId},#{position},#{tenureStart}::date,#{tenureEnd}::date,now())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM audit_leader WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id,p.project_name,p.audited_unit,p.audit_type,p.audit_year,p.status, (SELECT count(*) FROM audit_issue WHERE project_id=p.id) AS issue_count, (SELECT count(*) FROM audit_issue i JOIN audit_rectification r ON r.issue_id=i.id WHERE i.project_id=p.id AND r.status=2) AS rect_count FROM audit_project p ORDER BY p.audit_year DESC, p.status ASC

SELECT u.id,u.unit_name,u.unit_type,u.history_audit FROM audit_unit u WHERE u.id NOT IN ( SELECT u2.id FROM audit_unit u2 JOIN audit_project p ON p.audited_unit = u2.unit_name WHERE p.audit_year >= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM now()) - 1 ) ORDER BY u.unit_name

SELECT l.id,l.name,l.position,l.tenure_end,u.unit_name FROM audit_leader l JOIN audit_unit u ON u.id = l.unit_id WHERE l.tenure_end IS NOT NULL AND l.tenure_end::date <= (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '6 month')::date AND l.tenure_end::date >= CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY l.tenure_end ASC
SELECT id,name,position,to_char(tenure_start,'YYYY-MM-DD') tenure_start, to_char(tenure_end,'YYYY-MM-DD') tenure_end FROM audit_leader WHERE unit_id=#{unitId} ORDER BY tenure_start DESC
SELECT id,project_name,audit_type,audit_year,status FROM audit_project WHERE audited_unit = (SELECT unit_name FROM audit_unit WHERE id=#{unitId}) ORDER BY audit_year DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_plan_project(plan_id, project_id) VALUES(#{planId}, #{projectId}) ON CONFLICT (plan_id, project_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM audit_plan_project WHERE plan_id=#{planId} AND project_id=#{projectId}
mapper.select: SELECT pp.project_id, p.project_name, p.audited_unit, p.audit_type, p.audit_year, p.status, pp.bind_time FROM audit_plan_project pp JOIN audit_project p ON p.id=pp.project_id WHERE pp.plan_id=#{planId} ORDER BY pp.bind_time DESC
SELECT s.*, p.project_name FROM audit_scheme s LEFT JOIN audit_project p ON p.id=s.project_id WHERE s.plan_id=#{planId} ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
